description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Dated in several locations according to the Islamic calendar, probably in the year 968 AH (חסץ) but this alphanumerical designation is backwards compared to other contemporary usage in which ץ appears as 900 (see for example ENA 3720.2v PGPID 39645). The commodity "wine" (נביד) is mentioned at least twice on the verso. MCD.
description_he: חשבונות ביהודית-ערבית, מתוארכים לפי לוח אסלאמי, כנראה שנת 968 להג'רה (חסץ); הסחורה 'נביד' (יין) מוזכרת לפחות פעמיים בגב
